description: A viscous liquid extracted from plants, animals, or minerals; what smooths and nourishes. 'Loesi' names what flows rich—the essence that eases friction and feeds flame.
sound_symbolism: The word flows slick. 'Lo' opens with liquid release, oil pouring. The vowel 'e' eases smoothly. Then 'si' slicks with sliding finish.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'loesi' (the oil). As verb: 'mia loesi.' (I oil.) For cooking, lighting, lubricating, healing.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Smooth as oil—reducing friction, easing resistance, the quality of non-contention.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Oil lit the darkness—lamp oil extending productive hours, cooking oil nourishing.
